title: Basic JavaScript Module Patterns
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Module Patterns. Focus on implementing Revealing module pattern correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Module Patterns
description: Create a function that uses Revealing module pattern and AMD modules (RequireJS) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Module Patterns Project
description: Build a small application that applies Revealing module pattern, AMD modules (RequireJS), CommonJS (Node.js) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Module Patterns
description: The following code has bugs related to Revealing module pattern. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Module Patterns
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Revealing module pattern and AMD modules (RequireJS).
